notes.note:
Removing a download from the Downloads screen now prompts you to choose whether to delete the file from your device storage, preventing downloads from being unexpectedly removed from the device. You can change the default behavior in the Download settings. ([Bug 2041355][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2041355

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you at [Android Support][1]


  [1]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 151.0.2 Release
